name: ergzone-mcp
description: Manage ErgZone (Concept2 rowing) workouts, results and stats from Claude.
long_description: Unofficial MCP server for ErgZone. Browse and create workouts (including interval builders), read your results with per-interval telemetry, and check stats. Logs in to ErgZone for you using your Concept2 Logbook account.

email.title: Concept2 Logbook email or username
email.description: The account you use to log in at log.concept2.com

password.title: Concept2 Logbook password
password.description: Your log.concept2.com password (stored locally, used to log in)

track_id.title: Default workout list (optional)
track_id.description: Leave as is unless you know your ErgZone track ID
